body.title: Consequence check: Igor migration to devices/igor/
body.result: Migration complete: 15 wild_igor refs all importorskip tests or doc comments, no live imports; Igor startup clean (checked tmux + logs); no 'wild_igor' import errors in channel. Effect: clear.
body.description:
**What changed:** Igor's 273-file cognition codebase moved from TheIgors/wild_igor/ into UnseenUniversity/devices/igor/ with imports rewritten from wild_igor.igor.* to devices.igor.*

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Stale `wild_igor` references in CC skills, habits DB, or palace notes that weren't caught by the import rewrite
- TheIgors lab/ scripts that assumed wild_igor/ exists and now fail silently
- Any hardcoded paths in igor.switches.cfg or IGOR_HOME env setup that point to wild_igor/
- MCP tool registrations that reference old module paths
- Igor self-reports (habit fire logs, NE outputs) that reference old file paths becoming confusing in forensics

**Signals to watch:** Igor startup failures (tmux session not alive); `grep -rn wild_igor` returning hits in unexpected places; test failures referencing wild_igor; channel messages from Igor containing import errors

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-08. All signal checks clean.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
